BpmGenreCoherence.injection: RESOLVER: Producer selected {genre} at {bpm} BPM — outside the typical range for this style. Do not infer or change the genre based on BPM. Treat this as an intentional producer choice.

LowEndBalance.injection: RESOLVER: Low-end energy is critically high at {low_pct}%. Prioritize kick and bass separation in your drum advice.

HighEndPresence.injection: RESOLVER: High-end presence is very thin at {high_pct}%. Explicitly address snare and hi-hat clarity in your advice.

TrackDuration.injection: RESOLVER: Track is only {duration}s — likely a short loop or incomplete arrangement. Acknowledge this when giving arrangement feedback.

DrumPresence.injection: RESOLVER: No drum track found in this MIDI. Omit drum-specific advice. Focus on melodic layering and harmonic texture.

MelodyPresence.injection: RESOLVER: This MIDI contains only drums — no melodic instruments detected. Focus all three moves on groove, rhythm, and drum sound design.
